name: saas-skills-advisory
description: Advisory gates derived from saas-* skill Exit Criteria. Every check is severity=warning for v6.2; promote to blocking in v6.3 once teams confirm the checks fit their codebases. Compose alongside nodejs-saas.json or similar via run-gates.py --config <path> --gate <gate-name>.

gates.name: saas-payments-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-payments. See project/skills/saas-payments/SKILL.md for full criteria.

manual_steps: Add stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, secret) in your webhook handler.
Reject events with invalid signatures with HTTP 400.

checks.name: No price IDs hardcoded in source
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'price_[A-Za-z0-9]{14,}' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' . | grep -v -E 'process\.env|\.test\.|\.spec\.'; then echo 'FAIL: hardcoded price IDs'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

manual_steps: Move all price_xxx IDs out of source code into environment variables.

checks.name: API version pinned
checks.command: grep -rn 'apiVersion:' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' . | grep -i stripe > /dev/null && echo 'OK' || (echo 'NO MATCH'; exit 1)

gates.name: saas-auth-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-auth. See project/skills/saas-auth/SKILL.md for full criteria.

checks.name: No tokens in localStorage
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'localStorage\.setItem.*(token|session|jwt|auth)' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.jsx' .; then echo 'FAIL: token in localStorage'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

manual_steps: Move auth tokens out of localStorage into httpOnly cookies.
See project/skills/saas-auth/SKILL.md anti-pattern: 'I'll put the JWT in localStorage'.

checks.name: Rate limiting present on auth routes

gates.name: saas-billing-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-billing. See project/skills/saas-billing/SKILL.md for full criteria.

manual_steps: Add server-side quota / feature gating middleware.
UI-only gating is bypassable; see project/skills/saas-billing/SKILL.md anti-pattern.

checks.name: No hard-delete on downgrade
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'deleteExcessProjects|hard.*delete.*projects' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.py' .; then echo 'FAIL: hard delete on downgrade'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

gates.name: saas-multitenancy-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-multitenancy. See project/skills/saas-multitenancy/SKILL.md for full criteria.

checks.name: No tenant ID accepted from request body
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'req\.body\.tenantId|body\[.tenant_id.\]|request\.body\[.tenantId.\]' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.py' .; then echo 'FAIL: tenant from body'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

manual_steps: Derive tenant ID from authenticated session or auth context, never from request body.

checks.name: Cache keys namespaced by tenant
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'cache\.(set|get)\([^)]*["\x27]' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.py' . | grep -v 'tenant:'; then echo 'WARN: unnamespaced cache key'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

gates.name: saas-email-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-email. See project/skills/saas-email/SKILL.md for full criteria.

checks.name: Email send goes through queue, not inline
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'emailService\.send|client\.emails\.send' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.py' . | grep -v -E 'queue|worker|test|spec'; then echo 'WARN: inline email send found'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

gates.name: saas-onboarding-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-onboarding. See project/skills/saas-onboarding/SKILL.md for full criteria.

checks.name: Onboarding state persisted to DB, not localStorage
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'localStorage.*onboarding' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.jsx' .; then echo 'WARN: onboarding state in localStorage'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

gates.name: saas-analytics-exit
gates.description: Skill exit checks for saas-analytics. See project/skills/saas-analytics/SKILL.md for full criteria.

checks.name: Event names are snake_case
checks.command: if grep -rEn 'track\(["\x27][A-Z]|track\(["\x27][a-z]+-' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' .; then echo 'WARN: non snake_case event name'; exit 1; else echo 'OK'; fi

checks.name: Analytics gated by env
checks.command: grep -rEn 'NODE_ENV.*test|NODE_ENV.*development' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.py' . | grep -i analytics > /dev/null && echo 'OK' || (echo 'NO MATCH'; exit 1)
